content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom 49 (O:49) in the molecule. From this zoomed-in perspective, I can clearly see that oxygen atom 49 is covalently bonded to:

1. N:48 (nitrogen) - to the left, connected by a blue-red bond
2. C:42 (carbon) - to the right, connected by a red-yellow bond

The bonds are clearly visible in the visualization, with O:49 (red sphere) connected to N:48 (blue sphere) and C:42 (yellow/gold sphere).

Looking at the file information in the grounding, I can see the molecule file is named "geomconf_1755.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 1755.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 49 (O) are:
- Atom index 48, element N (nitrogen)
- Atom index 42, element C (carbon)

And the geomconf_index for this molecule is 1755.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 49, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
